meta.metaDescription: VP of Engineering with 20+ years of experience. Hands-on leader focused on dev happiness & business efficiency.

home.title: About
home.bio: 20+ years building software, teams, and companies. Hands-on VP who still codes.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.talkToIvoAriaLabel: Talk to Ivo, my AI-powered digital twin for interview-style questions.

talkToIvo.title: Talk to Ivo (BETA)
talkToIvo.intro: This is my digital twin. Treat it like a hallway conversation: ask about my experience (JOOR, ClickDimensions, Zapiens,...), how I build teams, or how I approach architecture and AI.

invite.title: Enter your invite code
invite.descriptionBeforeLink: This prevents abuse and keeps the costs reasonable. If you don't have a code yet,
invite.linkedInLinkText: reach out to me on LinkedIn

inviteError.invalid: That invite code doesn't look right. If you think this is a mistake, reach out to Iván on LinkedIn.
inviteError.network: I couldn't verify that code right now. Please try again in a moment or reach out on LinkedIn.

chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask Ivo something specific about my experience or approach...
chat.inviteHint: To keep this sustainable, you'll need an invite code to chat with Ivo.
